headline: Chris gets the spoils as Jack and Emily come unstuck
text: A tidy night for Chris, who nicked Colombia (Chris) past DR Congo (Jack) to stay on the up. Henry also had a decent one, with Croatia doing the business over Panama (Emily), while Alex had to settle for a goalless snooze against Ghana (Sara). Jack and Emily took the main knocks from the results. Up top, Max is still the class act on 14 points. At the other end, Sofia remains rooted to the foot of the table on 4, which is a bit of a state of affairs.
